productStatement: GrantLayer turns agentic grant workflows into verifiable institutional records.

runtimeModes.authExpectation: developer convenience; simplified or bypassed authentication acceptable
runtimeModes.allowedShortcut: deterministic local admin token, no external identity provider, no role enforcement
runtimeModes.auditExpectation: minimal; operator actions may be attributed to a generic local-dev identity
runtimeModes.productionClaimBoundary: must not be described as production-ready

runtimeModes.authExpectation: deterministic automated verification; mock or bypassed authentication acceptable
runtimeModes.allowedShortcut: fixture-based operator identities, synthetic role assignments, mock auth provider
runtimeModes.auditExpectation: none required; test identities are synthetic and isolated from production data
runtimeModes.productionClaimBoundary: must not be described as production-ready

runtimeModes.authExpectation: illustrative non-production walkthrough; simplified auth acceptable
runtimeModes.allowedShortcut: demo operator identity, demo tokens, no external identity provider
runtimeModes.auditExpectation: minimal; demo actions must be clearly labeled as synthetic
runtimeModes.productionClaimBoundary: must not be described as production-ready; explicitly labeled as demonstration only

runtimeModes.authExpectation: controlled external technical integration; partner-agreed authentication
runtimeModes.allowedShortcut: partner-agreed auth provider with documented constraints
runtimeModes.auditExpectation: partner-agreed; operator actions should be attributable where possible
runtimeModes.productionClaimBoundary: must not be described as production-ready without explicit partner agreement and documented constraints

runtimeModes.authExpectation: production-like validation; same auth target as production
runtimeModes.allowedShortcut: same backend and auth as production target; realistic but synthetic data
runtimeModes.auditExpectation: full audit trail to validate production behavior
runtimeModes.productionClaimBoundary: must not be described as production-ready; explicitly labeled as pre-production validation

runtimeModes.allowedShortcut: none — every required auth configuration must be explicit, validated, and fail-closed if missing
runtimeModes.auditExpectation: full; all operator-sensitive actions must produce auditable records
runtimeModes.productionClaimBoundary: may be described as production-ready only when all required auth configuration is explicit, validated, and monitored

operatorRoles.purpose: Ultimate system-level access for installation, bootstrap, and emergency recovery.
operatorRoles.auditExpectation: all actions are fully audited; bootstrap and override actions require documented justification
operatorRoles.productionRequirement: must be bootstrapped explicitly with documented credentials; must not use default or demo tokens
operatorRoles.nonGoals: day-to-day grant or evidence operations; those belong to grant_admin and evidence_operator

operatorRoles.auditExpectation: all approval and lifecycle actions are auditable with actor, timestamp, and policy reference
operatorRoles.productionRequirement: must be assigned through explicit auth provider role mapping or bootstrap
operatorRoles.nonGoals: system-level configuration; evidence verification; policy administration

operatorRoles.auditExpectation: all evidence writes and verification checks are auditable with hash references
operatorRoles.productionRequirement: must be assigned through explicit auth provider role mapping or bootstrap
operatorRoles.nonGoals: grant approvals; policy changes; system configuration

operatorRoles.auditExpectation: all policy and permission profile changes are auditable with before/after summaries
operatorRoles.productionRequirement: must be assigned through explicit auth provider role mapping or bootstrap
operatorRoles.nonGoals: grant approvals; evidence operations; system configuration

operatorRoles.auditExpectation: all export and review actions are auditable with scope and timestamp
operatorRoles.productionRequirement: must be assigned through explicit auth provider role mapping or bootstrap; read-only by design
operatorRoles.nonGoals: mutating any product core state; this role is explicitly read-only with export privileges

operatorRoles.purpose: Read-only integration access for external systems.
operatorRoles.auditExpectation: all queries are logged with caller identity and query scope
operatorRoles.productionRequirement: must be assigned through explicit auth provider role mapping or bootstrap; restricted to safe read paths
operatorRoles.nonGoals: any mutation of product core state

operatorRoles.purpose: Service-to-service workflow execution by external agents.
operatorRoles.auditExpectation: all workflow actions are attributable to a stable operator or service identity with timestamps
operatorRoles.productionRequirement: must authenticate through an explicit service identity provider with mTLS or equivalent; must not use demo tokens
operatorRoles.nonGoals: direct system administration; human operator actions

operatorRoles.auditExpectation: all service actions are attributable to a stable service identity with timestamps
operatorRoles.productionRequirement: must authenticate through an explicit internal service identity provider; must not use demo tokens
operatorRoles.nonGoals: direct human operator actions; grant approvals; evidence mutation

capabilityGroups.name: Grant request administration
capabilityGroups.description: Review, approve, reject, and manage grant requests. Link requests to subjects, scopes, and time bounds.

capabilityGroups.name: Grant approval operations
capabilityGroups.description: Execute approval decisions with required signatures. Enforce multi-step and quorum approval policies.

capabilityGroups.name: Grant creation and lifecycle operations
capabilityGroups.description: Create, update, revoke, and expire grants. Manage grant execution records.

capabilityGroups.name: Evidence write operations
capabilityGroups.description: Create, append, and finalize evidence bundles. Link evidence to grants, requests, and executions.

capabilityGroups.name: Evidence verification operations
capabilityGroups.description: Recompute and compare evidence hashes. Flag tampering, corruption, or completeness gaps.

capabilityGroups.name: Policy/rule pack administration
capabilityGroups.description: Load, validate, and activate policy rule packs. Manage exclusions, deadlines, amount limits, and required roles.

capabilityGroups.name: Permission profile administration
capabilityGroups.description: Define and assign permission profiles. Manage scope templates and role hierarchies.

capabilityGroups.name: Auditor report/export access
capabilityGroups.description: Export structured auditor records. Review compliance readiness summaries and gap reports.

capabilityGroups.name: Compliance readiness review
capabilityGroups.description: Access compliance readiness outputs. Review but not mutate readiness dimensions.

capabilityGroups.name: System configuration administration
capabilityGroups.description: Configure runtime settings, feature flags, and extension toggles. Manage system-level parameters with documented override procedures.

capabilityGroups.name: Readonly integration access
capabilityGroups.description: Query grants, requests, evidence, and audit records. No mutation rights; no approval or revocation access.

capabilityGroups.name: Service-to-service workflow execution
capabilityGroups.description: Execute workflow steps between services. Produce attributable action records with stable service identity.

productionClaimRules: Production claim is allowed only when runtime mode is explicitly set to production.
Production claim requires auth provider configuration to be explicit, validated, and non-default.
Production claim requires operator bootstrap configuration with explicit role assignments.
Production claim requires fail-closed behavior on missing or invalid auth configuration.
Production claim requires role/capability mapping to be implemented and verified.
Production claim requires audit expectations to be implemented for all operator-sensitive actions.
Production claim requires no demo tokens, default passwords, or synthetic identities in the auth path.
